params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsyms
params.description: Comma-separated to-symbols (target currencies), e.g. USD,EUR.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion
params.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

items.docs: Returns the latest aggregated price for a single source cryptocurrency converted into one or more target currencies. Uses CCCAGG by default.

params.name: fsyms
params.description: Comma-separated from-symbols (base cryptocurrencies), e.g. BTC,ETH.

params.name: tsyms
params.description: Comma-separated to-symbols (target currencies), e.g. USD,EUR.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion
params.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

items.docs: Returns the latest aggregated prices for multiple source cryptocurrencies converted into multiple target currencies in a single call.

params.name: fsyms
params.description: Comma-separated from-symbols (base cryptocurrencies), e.g. BTC,ETH.

params.name: tsyms
params.description: Comma-separated to-symbols (target currencies), e.g. USD,EUR.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion
params.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

items.docs: Returns full ticker data (price, 24h volume, high, low, open, change, market cap) for multiple from-symbols and to-symbols in one call. Same envelope is used by the CCCAGG WebSocket index.

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsym
params.description: To-symbol (target currency), e.g. USD.

params.name: e
params.description: Comma-separated list of exchanges to include in the average.

items.docs: Computes a custom average across a chosen set of exchanges for a single cryptocurrency pair (CUSTOMAGG).

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsyms
params.description: Comma-separated to-symbols (target currencies), e.g. USD,EUR.

params.name: ts
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the desired historical price.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion
params.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

items.docs: Returns the price of a cryptocurrency at a given historical timestamp. Falls back to the closest available candle close.

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsym
params.description: To-symbol (target currency), e.g. USD.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Time-period aggregation factor (e.g. 5 returns 5-minute candles for histominute).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion
params.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

items.docs: Returns daily OHLCV candles for a cryptocurrency pair, ordered ascending by timestamp. Up to 2000 data points per call.

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsym
params.description: To-symbol (target currency), e.g. USD.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Time-period aggregation factor (e.g. 5 returns 5-minute candles for histominute).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion

items.docs: Returns hourly OHLCV candles for a cryptocurrency pair. Up to 2000 data points per call.

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsym
params.description: To-symbol (target currency), e.g. USD.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: aggregate
params.description: Time-period aggregation factor (e.g. 5 returns 5-minute candles for histominute).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

params.name: e
params.description: Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).

params.name: tryConversion
params.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

items.docs: Returns minute OHLCV candles for a cryptocurrency pair. Up to 2000 data points per call and up to 7 days of history on the free tier.

info.name: Get Top List by Total Volume (Full Data)

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

params.name: page
params.description: Zero-indexed page number for paginated top-list endpoints.

params.name: tsym
params.description: Quote currency for the volume conversion.

items.docs: Returns the top cryptocurrencies by 24-hour total volume converted into a target currency, including full ticker data per coin.

info.name: Get Top List by Market Cap (Full Data)

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

params.name: page
params.description: Zero-indexed page number for paginated top-list endpoints.

params.name: tsym
params.description: Quote currency for the market-cap conversion.

items.docs: Returns the top cryptocurrencies by market capitalization with full ticker data per coin.

info.name: Get Top Exchanges by Pair Volume

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsym
params.description: To-symbol (target currency), e.g. USD.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

items.docs: Returns the top exchanges ranked by 24-hour volume for a given pair.

info.name: Get Top Exchanges (Full Data) by Pair Volume

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: tsym
params.description: To-symbol (target currency), e.g. USD.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

items.docs: Returns the top exchanges by 24-hour pair volume with full ticker data per exchange.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

params.name: tsym
params.description: Quote currency for the ranking.

items.docs: Returns the top cryptocurrencies by aggregate 24-hour volume against a given quote currency. Lighter payload than totalvolfull.

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

items.docs: Returns the most active trading pairs for a given from-symbol across every integrated exchange.

params.name: lang
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code. Defaults to EN.

params.name: feeds
params.description: Comma-separated list of source feed keys.

params.name: categories
params.description: Comma-separated list of category keys.

params.name: excludeCategories
params.description: Comma-separated list of categories to exclude.

params.name: lTs
params.description: Latest timestamp (seconds) to return articles before.

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: Sort order, latest or popular.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of articles to return (default 50).

items.docs: Returns the most recent cryptocurrency news articles aggregated from every integrated source. Filterable by language, source, and category.
Returns the list of news source feeds available for filtering.
Returns the list of news categories used for tagging articles.
Returns both available source feeds and categories in a single call.

params.name: coinId
params.description: CryptoCompare coin ID (e.g. 1182 for BTC).

items.docs: Returns the latest aggregated social statistics (Twitter, Reddit, code repository) for a single coin identified by its CryptoCompare coin ID.

info.name: Get Historical Daily Coin Social Stats

params.name: coinId
params.description: CryptoCompare coin ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

items.docs: Returns daily historical social statistics for a coin.

info.name: Get Historical Hourly Coin Social Stats

params.name: coinId
params.description: CryptoCompare coin ID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

items.docs: Returns hourly historical social statistics for a coin.

info.name: Get Order Book Top of Book

params.name: fsyms
params.description: Comma-separated from-symbols (base cryptocurrencies), e.g. BTC,ETH.

params.name: tsyms
params.description: Comma-separated to-symbols (target currencies), e.g. USD,EUR.

params.name: e
params.description: Comma-separated list of exchanges.

items.docs: Returns the top of the order book (best bid and ask) for one or more pairs across one or more exchanges. Requires an API key on most tiers.

info.name: Get All Exchanges and Trading Pairs

items.docs: Returns the full list of integrated exchanges and the trading pairs each exchange currently exposes.
Returns descriptive metadata, ranking grade, country, URL, and feature flags for every integrated exchange.

params.name: summary
params.description: When true, returns a slimmer payload without descriptions.

items.docs: Returns the complete CryptoCompare coin list with mapping, image URLs, algorithm, proof type, supply data, and CCData taxonomy.
Returns the list of coins that have on-chain blockchain data available (transaction count, active addresses, average transaction value, etc.).

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (coin) of the blockchain dataset.

items.docs: Returns the latest day of on-chain data for a coin including transaction count, average transaction value, active addresses, hashrate, difficulty, and large transaction count.

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (coin) of the blockchain dataset.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

items.docs: Returns daily on-chain data history (transaction count, value, active addresses, hashrate, difficulty) for a coin.

info.name: Get Historical Daily Blockchain Balance Distribution

params.name: fsym
params.description: From-symbol (coin) of the dataset.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).

params.name: toTs
params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

items.docs: Returns daily history of on-chain balance distribution buckets for a coin (addresses with 0-0.001, 0.001-0.01, etc., units of the asset).
